home.combineHint: Show revenue in the store default currency (ECB rates).

export.truncatedDesc: First {{count}} rows only (limit {{max}}). Narrow filters for a smaller export.

quickEdit.invalidSalePositiveDesc: Sale price must be greater than 0.

quickEdit.variationInvalidSaleLess: Variation "{{label}}": sale price must be less than regular price.

ai.title: AI image generation
ai.hintOriginalUrl: Uses the image URL from your store (original file path). Select a thumbnail below.

ai.additionalPromptPlaceholder: Optional extra directions for the model (style, background, etc.). Used on generate and regenerate.

ai.noFeatures: No AI image features are configured for this store yet.

ai.customPromptRequired: Enter your custom prompt before generating.
ai.hintApplyMain: Apply best replaces the main image after you approve (uploads to your store).
ai.hintApplyGallery: Apply best replaces gallery slot {{n}} after approval. Regenerate runs again from that same slot.
ai.hintRegenerateActions: Regenerate creates new staging images; Discard removes staging without changing your product.

imageEditor.exportFailed: Could not export the transformed image.
imageEditor.editorCrashed: The image editor failed to start.

danger.title: Danger Zone

danger.normalDesc: This will permanently delete {{name}} and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
danger.webhooksFailed: {{count}} webhook(s) could not be removed (site may be offline).
